_comment: Update these numbers periodically. Sources listed below.
sources: NPR (May 2026): 2,249 posts in first 4 months of 2026, avg 19/day
WCVB/Get the Facts: 6,168 posts in full year 2025, avg 18/day
Washington Post (Jun 2025): 2,262 posts in first 132 days of 2nd term
Roll Call (Oct 2024): 24+ posts/day avg through Oct 2024

records.label: Most posts in one evening
records.note: Dec 1, 2025 — a late-night spree covering Christmas, Michelle Obama, Home Alone 2, and policy attacks.

records.label: Most posts in one month
records.note: January 2024 — E. Jean Carroll verdict, Iowa caucuses, and relentless campaign posting.

records.label: 2nd most in one month
records.note: August 2024 — second assassination attempt month; posting surged as travel became restricted.

records.label: Posts during VP debate
records.note: Oct 1, 2024 — posted play-by-play for 90 minutes straight during Vance vs. Walz.
